title: The Meta-Agent Challenge: Are Current Agents Capable of Autonomous Agent Development?
summary: The Meta-Agent Challenge: Are Current Agents Capable of Autonomous Agent Development?
whyItMatters: Current AI benchmarks evaluate agents on task execution within human-designed workflows. These evaluations fundamentally fail to measure a critical next-level capability: whether models can autonomously develop agent systems. We introduce the Meta-Agent Challenge (MAC), an evaluation framework designed to test the capacity of frontier models for autonomous…
